name: onnozelaer-claude-marketplace
description: Personally created Claude Code plugins by Onnozelaer.

plugins.name: cabinet-of-imd
plugins.description: The Cabinet of IMD Agents — a crew of 8 college classmates who serve as specialized web development agents. Vault-native Markdown chatter, lazy character loading, organic personality, gated handoffs, Obsidian integration, and a /dream command for deep vault analysis.

plugins.name: taste-claude
plugins.description: Premium frontend design skills that override default AI biases — enforcing high-end typography, calibrated color, asymmetric layouts, motion choreography, and anti-generic UI standards across multiple aesthetic modes.

plugins.name: iteration-shelf
plugins.description: Terminal-aesthetic review boards for in-browser design iteration. Generates a curated shelf and a monster index from a JSON manifest — self-contained HTML, zero build step, on-demand iframe loading, sidebar outliner, and a warn-gate that keeps the browser from stalling on 100+ iterations. Explicit invocation only. Integrates with Superpowers and the Cabinet plugin.

plugins.name: bash-tui-toolkit
plugins.description: Build polished, interactive bash CLI tools with rich terminal UI — menus, tables, loading bars, spinners, splash screens, transitions, and animated effects. Makes shell scripts look crafted, not cobbled.
